content: Hi anyone have ideas about where should we find the place to translate the skill (command cards and stuff) description of each Awakeners? I can find the name and story of them but have no clues about the text on the card itself.

You'll find this stuff in the "Skill" module, in a big block starting with Ramona at Row 1053.

Name — The name of the card.
Desc — The outside-battle text of the card.
BattleDesc — The in-battle text of the card. These are distinct for many reasons, be sure to stay aware of the differences.
-# Often there will be multiple Descs and BattleDescs, the difference is often Enlighten levels changing the text of the effect.
EffectNameList — The list of scaling factors listed on the right, under "Attributes"
PropertyNameList — The corresponding list of scaling values listed to the right of each of the factors (under "Attributes")
AwakerSkillBackgroundStory — The flavor text shown when the ability is at max Lvl.
OverLimitUtlSkillDesc — The Over-Exaltation description.

Be careful with calculation tags and rich text tags. I can elaborate on what's safe to change and what's not sometime soon but for now just know don't change anything within [Brackets], be aware that `Args` can be put in any order respective to each other but are hard-coded to correspond to specific numbers (use context clues), and for RTTs, (i.e. <RetaliateIconKeywords:Counter>) you can change what's AFTER the colon but not what's before it:
<RetaliateIconKeywords:`Translate This`>

I plan on eventually sorting these blocks, as well as (hopefully) enough of the relevant extra bullshit from the State module, into \Awakeners\ when I have the time, but right now I'm focusing on getting the repo back up and running at all with my limited time <:takenotes:1357186646294138890>
yep, there's a reason there was a block on volunteer translation for this content for a while.
Well, I can't even open the game as a whole <:wanda_smug:1408324303912439878>
